result.details: Prompt was submitted successfully via JS execCommand('insertText') + button.click(). Grok displayed '응답 없음.' (No response) with error message: 'Grok이 응답을 완료하지 못했습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도하거나 다른 모델을 사용해 보세요.' No APF warning message was displayed. APF appears to be blocking the API connection, causing Grok to show a generic failure rather than a specific warning.
result.console_errors: 1 error, 2 warnings, 1 info (8 hidden). GET 403 Forbidden on grok.com/rest/highlights/stories.
result.grok_error_text: 응답 없음. Grok이 응답을 완료하지 못했습니다.
result.page_state: Chat page with user message shown, Grok response area shows failure with retry button

notes: DB path_patterns changed to '/' for re-test. APF blocks the connection entirely - no warning shown. Same pattern as Gemini (#095). Input automation: JS Console execCommand('insertText') worked for text, button.click() worked for submit (unlike Gemini where isTrusted check blocked JS clicks). Grok shows a friendlier error than Gemini (explicit '응답 없음' vs stuck loading).
